name: Tarkaz the Tribeless
description_en: Tarkaz is a furious Troll, who doesn't belong to any tribe. He fought the Avarosans and Tryndamere himself. Tryndamere believed, that Tarkaz had fought harder and better than most and took his defeat almost gracefully.
description_fr: Tarkaz est un Troll furieux, qui n'appartient à aucune tribu. Il combattit les Avarosans et Tryndamere lui-même. Tryndamere croyait que Tarkaz s'était battu plus dur et mieux que la plupart et avait accepté sa défaite presque avec grâce.
